description: Stable machine-consumed reason codes for deterministic policy outcomes.

codes.summary: The request is denied by the default fail-closed policy posture.
The request is allowed because the signed manifest explicitly opts into the evaluated capability.
The request remains allowed only after the required human-approval checkpoint is satisfied.
MicroVM backend selection is allowed as the default execution posture when available.
Container backend selection is denied unless explicit opt-in is present and approval is requested.
Container backend selection is denied unless reduced-assurance acknowledgment is explicitly provided.
Automatic fallback from microVM to container backend is denied fail-closed.
The requested artifact producer-consumer flow is not present in the signed flow matrix and is denied fail-closed.
unapproved_file_excerpts are never eligible for third-party egress in MVP policy.
approved_file_excerpts require explicit signed-manifest opt-in before third-party egress is allowed.
The approved_file_excerpts artifact hash is denylisted and blocked from future flows or egress.
A per-role or per-step artifact quota limit was exceeded and the action was denied.
